hero.title: Privacy Policy
hero.description: Thank you for using HEIC JPG NOW. We care about your privacy and explain in clear language what we collect, why we use it, and what choices you have.

sections.title: 1. Information We Do Not Collect
body: HEIC to JPG conversion runs in your browser. Your image files are not uploaded to our servers and are not stored by us.
list: You can use our tool without creating an account or submitting personal information.
We do not store your image files on our servers, either before or after conversion.

sections.title: 2. Information We Collect
body: To keep the service reliable and improve your experience, we may collect the following information within a limited scope.
list: Analytics information (for example, page views, feature usage, and device/browser information).
Preference data such as language settings (we may use cookies, similar technologies, and sessionStorage).
Information you voluntarily provide when contacting us (such as your email address and message).

sections.title: 3. How We Use Information
body: We use collected information only for the purposes below.
list: To provide the service, keep it stable, and resolve technical issues.
To understand usage patterns and improve features and usability.
To prevent misuse and maintain security.
To respond to support requests and comply with legal obligations.

sections.title: 4. Third-Party Services We Use
body: For operations and improvement, we use the following third-party services.
list: Google Analytics (for traffic analysis and product improvement).
Google Search Console (for search performance and indexing status).
Google AdSense: Google and its partners may use cookies or similar technologies to show ads based on your previous visits to this and other websites.
You can manage personalized ads in Google Ads Settings (https://adssettings.google.com/).
For more information about how Google uses data, see https://support.google.com/adsense/answer/1348695?hl=en.
notes: Information collected and processed by third-party services is governed by each provider's own policies.

sections.title: 5. Your Rights
body: We do not require account registration and we do not store uploaded image files on our servers. Except when you voluntarily contact us, we generally do not obtain information that directly identifies you.
list: For information you provide in support emails, you may request access, correction, or deletion.
You can delete or disable cookies in your browser settings. For personalized ads and data use by third-party services such as Google, please use each provider's official settings pages.

sections.title: 6. Policy Updates
body: We may revise this policy due to changes in laws, service features, or third-party services.
If a significant change occurs, we will post a notice on the site and update the revision date.

contact.title: 7. Contact
contact.description: If you have questions about this policy or would like to request access, correction, or deletion, please contact us:
contact.response: We usually respond within 3 business days.
